hero.title: IT Consulting & Software Development
hero.subtitle: Codefjell delivers expert IT consulting, software development, and technology training to help your business move forward.

portal.title: Web Portal Operations
portal.description: Management and operation of web portals — keeping your online presence running reliably and securely.

consulting.title: IT Consulting
consulting.description: Expert guidance on technology decisions, digital strategy, and IT architecture tailored to your business needs.

software.title: Software Development
software.description: Custom software built to solve real problems — reliable, maintainable, and designed for long-term growth.

programming.title: Programming
programming.description: Hands-on programming services across a wide range of languages, platforms, and technical challenges.

education.title: Education & Training
education.description: Programming, software development, and IT courses — available both in-person and online.

about.heading: About Codefjell
about.description: Codefjell is a Norwegian IT company offering consulting, software development, and technology education. We work closely with clients to deliver practical, scalable solutions — and we share our knowledge through courses that are accessible to everyone, online and in the classroom.

contact.heading: Ready to Get Started?
